programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: After burning though eight lives, Puss in Boots sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore all nine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: Searching for a safer habitat, the prehistoric Crood family discovers an idyllic, walled-in paradise that meets all of its needs. Unfortunately, they must also learn to live with the Bettermans -- a family that's a couple of steps above the Croods on the evolutionary ladder. As tensions between the new neighbors start to rise, a new threat soon propels both clans on an epic adventure that forces them to embrace their differences, draw strength from one another, and survive together.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: Mario and Luigi go on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: Mario and Luigi go on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart (Sandra Bullock) was never thrilled to have to go undercover as a competitor in a beauty pageant. Now Gracie, who works for the FBI, is dealing with some very public attention thanks to her waltz down the runway. Her overnight celebrity does not impress her new partner, Sam Fuller (Regina King). But the pair has to put aside their differences when one of Gracie's former beauty queen pals, Cheryl Frasier (Heather Burns), turns up missing, and the FBI is put on the case.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kourtney gives Kris the cold shoulder after she screws up and is a no show for her first cover shoot; Rob has problems adjusting to living with a girlfriend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kourt decides to take Scott back and gives birth to their son, Mason; Kim learns to manage her professional life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kourt house hunts in New York City while the family tries to keep her in L.A.; Bruce decides if he should get his dog neutered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim invites Scott to a family trip to New York to show Kourtney how far he has come as a family man; Kim also contemplates an unexpected move to Chicago; Kris fears her mother might be seriously ill.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Pt. 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloé's ex; Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week; tension boils over when Kim and Khloé confront Kourtney over her recent attitude.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week, Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids; realizing that her lifestyle is making her unhappy, Kourtney considers making a major change; Kylie is too sick to fulfill her work obligations in Paris.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Abandoned on the mean city streets by his lowlife owner, Doug, a naive but lovable dog named Reggie falls in with a fast-talking, foul-mouthed Boston Terrier and his gang of strays. Determined to seek revenge, Reggie and his new canine pals embark on an epic adventure to get him home and make Doug pay for his dirty deed.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart (Sandra Bullock) was never thrilled to have to go undercover as a competitor in a beauty pageant. Now Gracie, who works for the FBI, is dealing with some very public attention thanks to her waltz down the runway. Her overnight celebrity does not impress her new partner, Sam Fuller (Regina King). But the pair has to put aside their differences when one of Gracie's former beauty queen pals, Cheryl Frasier (Heather Burns), turns up missing, and the FBI is put on the case.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: When a terrorist threatens to bomb the Miss United States pageant, the FBI rushes to find a female agent to go undercover as a contestant. Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: FBI Special Agent Sarah Ashburn (Sandra Bullock) is a methodical investigator with a long-standing reputation for excellence -- and arrogance. In contrast, foul-mouthed, hot-tempered detective Shannon Mullins (Melissa McCarthy) goes with her gut instincts and street smarts to remove criminals from the streets of Boston. Sparks fly when these polar opposites have to work together to capture a drug lord, but in the process, they become the last thing anyone expected -- buddies.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: Faced with deportation to her native Canada, high-powered book editor Margaret Tate says she's engaged to marry Andrew Paxton, her hapless assistant. Andrew agrees to the charade, but imposes a few conditions of his own, including flying to Alaska to meet his eccentric family. With a suspicious immigration official always lurking nearby, Margaret and Andrew must stick to their wedding plan despite numerous mishaps.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: When a terrorist threatens to bomb the Miss United States pageant, the FBI rushes to find a female agent to go undercover as a contestant. Unfortunately, Gracie is the only female FBI agent who can "look the part" despite her complete lack of refinement and femininity. She prides herself in being "just one of the boys" and is horrified at the idea of becoming a girly girl.

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki Glaser moves back to her hometown of St. Louis, where she rekindles a relationship with her ex-boyfriend, Chris; Nikki's mom lends a hand decorating Nikki's bedroom with pink walls & posters of pop stars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: While Nikki performs a sold-out show in St. Louis, a prank gone wrong has the police at her parents' house looking for Nikki; Chris and Nikki go on a date, but it seems that Chris loves someone else more than Nikki.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: While planning a shower for her pregnant sister, Nikki starts envisioning children in her own future; Nikki decides to finally pursue her goal of becoming a musician and records her first single.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: With Chris and her parents sitting next to one another at her upcoming show in Chicago, Nikki fears her act will embarrass them as she shares intimate details about her sex life on stage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: After finally consummating her relationship with Chris in Chicago, Nikki wants to have bigger conversations about their future, but Chris deflects; Nikki faces her singing insecurities and performs live for the first time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki feels her relationship with Chris isn't progressing the way she wants it to, so she decides to explore other options; she meets a guy who has all the traits she's looking for.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: Nikki's dislike of nature and activities is challenged by a visit to her parents' river cabin; Nikki and Chris go to couples' therapy even though they aren't a couple.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome Home Nikki Glaser?
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, Nikki quickly falls back into her old work routine and considers a permanent return; Chris' decision about whether or not to commit might just entice Nikki to stay in St. Louis a little while longer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin struggles to maintain control as the rivalry between Brittainy and Shannon continues to cause chaos at the office; Jay blindsides Kristin when he announces he wants to buy a new house; Shannon and Gurney's relationship is put to the test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin's business is booming, with brand new Uncommon James offices, a wildly growing staff, and massive plans for expansion; Brittainy's work life's going great, but her relationship with Stone is on the rocks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin heads to Chicago to meet up with her friend Biegs and check out spaces for a potential second UJ store; finding out if she's going to get her dream space or not, however, has her on edge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: Kristin still mourns her failed friendship with Kelly; Brittainy is newly single, but is shocked when she is late getting her period and fears that she might be pregnant with Stone's baby.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.sub-title: Home Wasn't Built in a Day
programme.desc: Kristin heads back home to Chicago to visit her mom and check on the progress of her new retail store; time is ticking and Kristin wants to launch the store, but the contractors are unsure if they can meet her demands.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Very Cavallari
programme.desc: As her company grows, Kristin struggles to find a work-life balance and feels pressure to take a step back, while Jay has his sights set on bringing some mini donkeys to the farm; Justin begins to fear the leap from L.A. to Nashville.

programme.desc: Kristin takes off to Mexico for her first ever Uncommon James National TV commercial shoot with Brittainy, Pip and Jack; Heidi and Audrina fly to Nashville to reminisce about their time on "The Hills," and try to figure out who they can trust.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's life turns upside down when his brother and nephew move in; at the supermarket, Charlie discovers he can use 10-year-old Jake to attract women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie doesn't know how to discipline Jake for luring a flock of sea gulls into his room; Judith surprises Alan when he goes home to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
